scripts.test:repeat: sh -c 'for i in 1 2 3; do "$npm_execpath" test "$@" || exit 1; done' --
scripts.nix:agent:check: scripts/nix-run.sh release -- scripts/require-tools.sh release -- bun agent:check
scripts.nix:fixtures: scripts/nix-run.sh release -- scripts/require-tools.sh release -- bun fixtures
scripts.nix:test: scripts/nix-run.sh release -- scripts/require-tools.sh release -- bun test
scripts.nix:test:repeat: scripts/nix-run.sh release -- scripts/require-tools.sh release -- sh -c 'for i in 1 2 3; do bun test "$@" || exit 1; done' --
scripts.nix:build: scripts/nix-run.sh release -- scripts/require-tools.sh release -- bun run build
scripts.nix:mutation: scripts/nix-run.sh release -- scripts/require-tools.sh release -- bun mutation
